titleStmt.title: SII 31.365: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 365. (A.R. No. B 215 of 1936.) INUMEḶḶA, VINUKONDA TALUK GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the second face of the slab set up in front of the Bhāvanārāyṇa swāmy temple.
This undated record can be assigned to the 19th century A.D. on the basis of palaeographical and internal evidences.

Registers the plantation of mango grove and a well on the north-west side of the temple and donated these as gifts to the god by the Rāja Malrāju Ramaṇammagāru in the name of the elder daughter Jūpalli Lakshmikāntamma who was the wife of Rāja Malrāju Venkaṭa Punalā Rayanimgaru and the mother of Venkaṭa ramaṇayya and Lakshmayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
rājāmalrāju ramaṇaṁmma
gāru tamapedda komāraigāruṁ
nnu rājāmalrāju veṁkkaṭa guṁ
ḍḍārāyaniṁgāri bhāryalaina veṁ
kkaṭaramaṇayyagāriki lakṣmayyagā
riki talligāruṁnnu Ayni jāpalli
lakṣmīkāṁtaṁmmagāri pērumīda
śrīsvāmivāri kōvelaku vāyavya
bhāgamaṁddu māmiḍivanaṁ vēyiṁ
cci Āvanamunaku tū¨rpubhāgamaṁ
ddu bhāvi tavviṁcci śrīsvāmivāriki
sama¨rpiṁccinārū .
Digital edition of SII 31.365 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
